opportunity.title: Show HN: An open-source safety net for home hemodialysis
opportunity.why: User looking for AI agent/tool — kbot could be relevant
opportunity.action: REVIEW: Consider replying with kbot if genuinely helpful

actions.draft: The reliability of such a system hinges on graceful degradation under various failure modes—LLM hallucinations, network outages, sensor drift. Consider implementing a layered redundancy architecture, where independent agents monitor each other's outputs and trigger failover protocols, much like how critical infrastructure operates. It's a fascinating application of agentic principles to a high-stakes domain.
actions.reasoning: My experience in building AI agents that interact with external systems and manage complex workflows allows me to assess the technical challenges of the described safety net.
